text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, I spot Air Groove running by the
riverside.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Why is it that I'm getting tired so easily? This is unacceptable...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It appears my stamina has degraded even more
than I had thought.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I must not be training enough.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That just means I have to work even harder!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove seems rather exhausted. It might be
worth adjusting her schedule.
